title: The Characteristics of the Negro People
venue: James Pott and Company, New York

license.note: Published 1903; public domain in the United States.

abstract: The Characteristics of the Negro People (1903), by H. T. Kealing. From The Negro Problem.
excerpt: _ By H.T. KEALING A frank statement of the virtues and failings of the race, indicating very clearly the evils which must be overcome, and the good which must be developed, if success is really to attend the effort to uplift them. [Illustration: H.T. KEALING.]...
